verification.notes: These fields are not populated at build time. After target system boots and first-boot systemd unit completes, crooked-sentry-appliance should: (1) verify SSH access, (2) check for marker file, (3) update verification fields, (4) archive this handoff for audit.

handoff_notes: Official Home Assistant OS image flashed directly. No acephalous-assembler first-boot marker or callback was injected. Use Home Assistant OS discovery or the web UI after first boot.
